
### a data hazard  {.smaller}

![](/pipeline/texfig/addqDataHazard.figure.svg){.absolute top="0%" left="0%" width=1050 height=600 .my-center }
 <!-- \lstset{
    style=small,
    moredelim=**[is][\btHL<2|handout:0>]{@2@}{@},
    moredelim=**[is][\btHL<3|handout:0>]{@3@}{@},
    moredelim=**[is][\btHL<4|handout:0>]{@4@}{@},
    moredelim=**[is][\btHL<5|handout:0>]{@5@}{@},
} -->
 
<pre><code>// initially %r8 = 800,
//           %r9 = 900, etc.
addq %r8, %r9   // R8 + R9 -&gt; R9
addq %r9, %r8   // R9 + R8 -&gt; R9
addq ...
addq ...        
</code></pre>
 

::: {.r-stack}
![](/pipeline/texfig/addqDataHazard_2.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}

![](/pipeline/texfig/addqDataHazard_2.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}


:::


### data hazard  {.smaller}


```
addq %r8, %r9  // (1)
addq %r9, %r8  // (2)

```
 ![](/pipeline/texfig/DataHazardTime.figure.svg)
 

* pipeline reads <em>older value</em>…
* instead of value ISA says was just written
